sections.paragraph: in sing. Isa 28:4, according to the Masor. (see בִּכּוּרָה ), elsewhere always in pl. בִּכּוּרִים, בִּכֻּרִים firstfruits, used of fruits and of grain, the firstfruits gathered from the field and the trees, Num 13:20, especially of the firstfruits offered to God, Lev 2:14 23:17 Neh 10:36. There is sometimes added רֵאשִׁית Exo 23:19 34:26 לֶחֶם הַבִּכּוּרִים “bread baked from the firstfruits,” Lev 23:20 יֹום הַבִּכּוּרִים “the day of firstfruits,” used of the feast of Pentecost, Num 28:26.
